mapper.sql: select id, full_name, full_path, platform_id, git_url, default_branch, description, selected_branches, enabled, local_dir, last_sync_at, created_at, extra from git_source_repos
mapper.insert: insert into git_source_repos (id, full_name, full_path, platform_id, git_url, default_branch, description, selected_branches, enabled, local_dir, last_sync_at, created_at, extra) values (#{id}, #{fullName}, #{fullPath}, #{platformId}, #{gitUrl}, #{defaultBranch}, #{description}, #{selectedBranches}, #{enabled}, #{localDir}, #{lastSyncAt}, #{createdAt}, #{extra})
mapper.delete: delete from git_source_repos where id in #{id}
